task.en: In System Settings → Desktop & Dock, scroll to the bottom and click `Hot Corners…`. Set ONLY the bottom-right corner to `Start Screen Saver`, then click Done to save. Leave the other three corners unchanged (set to `-` / no action).

pre_command: for C in tl tr bl br; do defaults write com.apple.dock wvous-$C-corner -int 1 2>/dev/null; defaults write com.apple.dock wvous-$C-modifier -int 0 2>/dev/null; done; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; killall Dock 2>/dev/null; sleep 2
grading_command: killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; BR=$(defaults read com.apple.dock wvous-br-corner 2>/dev/null); [ "$BR" = "5" ] && echo True || echo False

killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; TL=$(defaults read com.apple.dock wvous-tl-corner 2>/dev/null); BL=$(defaults read com.apple.dock wvous-bl-corner 2>/dev/null); TR=$(defaults read com.apple.dock wvous-tr-corner 2>/dev/null); ( [ "$TL" != "5" ] && [ "$BL" != "5" ] && [ "$TR" != "5" ] ) && echo True || echo False
killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; BR=$(defaults read com.apple.dock wvous-br-corner 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$BR" ] && [ "$BR" != "1" ] && echo True || echo False
